description:
From this chain hangs a gem that is very finely cut, giving it countless glittering faces. It can take the place of various other items for the purpose of activating certain set bonuses.

re-acquired or upgraded to a higher level version. This item is also keyed
for Cannith Crafting, and may be Disjuncted so that it can be crafted upon.
Note that upgrading this item to a higher level version through Epic or Legendary

available set bonuses.
